title: Cabo Verde says goodbye to World Cup after loss to Argentina with outstanding performance by goalkeeper Bozinha
summary: The African team fought with pride but could not overcome the defending champion, while its goalkeeper became one of the revelations of the tournament.

title: Russia announces capture of strategic city in eastern Ukraine and Putin visits area
summary: The Russian president reiterated his intention to continue the military offensive after taking control of an important Ukrainian stronghold.

title: Alert for heavy rains and disaster risk in Kyushu, Japan
summary: The Meteorological Agency warns about the possible formation of linear rainbands that could cause flooding and landslides in Oita and Kumamoto prefectures.

title: US commemorates 250 years of independence amid reflections on its legacy of slavery and nuclear conflict
summary: The anniversary has revived debate about the country's founding contradictions and the influence of Trumpism.

title: Croatia and Modric say goodbye to World Cup amid refereeing controversies using technology
summary: The veteran midfielder played his last World Cup match, marked by a goal disallowed after electronic review and elimination by Portugal.

title: Messi sets record of 20 goals in World Cups and qualifies Argentina for round of 16
summary: The Argentine forward scored in his eighth consecutive match and surpassed the all-time scoring record in World Cups.

title: Colombia beats Ghana in World Cup with early goal
summary: The Colombian team prevailed in their group stage match and took an important step toward the next round.

title: Yen falls to 161 yen per dollar in New York due to market adjustments
summary: The Japanese currency weakened against the dollar in a session with low participation ahead of the July 4 holiday.

title: Iran prepares for funeral of Ayatollah Khamenei with massive international attendance
summary: Leaders from more than a hundred countries arrive in Tehran to bid farewell to the deceased Iranian supreme leader.

title: Keiko Fujimori wins presidency of Peru in closely contested elections
summary: The daughter of former President Alberto Fujimori won by a narrow margin and becomes the country's first president of Japanese descent.

title: Japan's LDP proposes new law to expand anti-espionage wiretapping
summary: The ruling party debates creating a legal framework allowing communication interception to strengthen national intelligence.

title: Kyoto finalizes preparations for Gion festival with traditional lanterns and floats
summary: Artisans and volunteers put the finishing touches on Komagata lanterns and float figures for the celebration of the emblematic event.

title: Japan, eliminated from World Cup, plans friendly against Brazil and coach Moriyasu promises improvement
summary: After all Asian teams exited in the first round, the federation negotiates a match in Singapore and the coach assures that the team is on the right track.

title: Japan shows advances in artificial intelligence: from repelling bears to language models
summary: Different sectors of the country develop AI systems for agriculture, entertainment, and legal regulation of synthetic voices.

title: Earthquake in Venezuela leaves more than 2,600 dead and criticism of government for delay in response
summary: The devastating earthquake caused a humanitarian catastrophe and the interim president faces accusations of negligence.

title: El Niño presence declared with risk of heat waves and torrential rains globally
summary: The climate phenomenon could intensify extreme events and experts urge preparation to save lives.

title: Extreme heat wave in US affects 180 million people and disrupts 250th anniversary events
summary: The heat dome phenomenon raises temperatures to 38.9°C and forces cancellation of outdoor events.

title: Taylor Swift marries American football player
summary: The pop star married her athlete boyfriend in a private ceremony.

title: France debates policies on air conditioning amid historic heat wave
summary: High temperatures spark discussion about the use of cooling systems and their energy impact.

title: Japan, UK and Italy accelerate joint development of a next-generation fighter jet
summary: The three countries expand their collaboration contract to build an advanced military aircraft with cutting-edge technology.
